title: Lumenwave protocol passing $1B TVL by settlement
question: Did the Lumenwave Finance protocol report total value locked of at least $1,000,000,000 on the DeFiPulse Tracker dashboard at any point on or before the settlement date of 2026-09-30?

evidence.label: DeFiPulse Tracker dashboard page for Lumenwave Finance, showing the live TVL figure
Daily TVL history export (CSV) for Lumenwave, covering the period through 2026-09-30
Methodology note describing how DeFiPulse Tracker counts staked and pooled assets toward TVL
Archived snapshot of the Lumenwave dashboard taken at 23:59 UTC on the settlement date
